'''âr-z-k''' ('''razaka''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knawvshawl|knawvshawl]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-z-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knawvshawl|knawvshawl]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-z-k
|-
! Lemma
| razaka
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:razakithi|razakithi]] || [[word:razakiji|razakiji]] || [[word:razakishi|razakishi]] || [[word:razaki|razaki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:razakuthuth|razakuthuth]] || [[word:razakujuj|razakujuj]] || [[word:razakushush|razakushush]] || [[word:razak|razak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:razakuthu|razakuthu]] || [[word:razakuju|razakuju]] || [[word:razakushu|razakushu]] || [[word:razaku|razaku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:razakufuth|razakufuth]] || [[word:razakufuj|razakufuj]] || [[word:razakufush|razakufush]] || [[word:razakuf|razakuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:razakethe|razakethe]] || [[word:razakeje|razakeje]] || [[word:razakeshe|razakeshe]] || [[word:razake|razake]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:razakothoth|razakothoth]] || [[word:razakojoj|razakojoj]] || [[word:razakoshosh|razakoshosh]] || [[word:razak|razak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:razakotho|razakotho]] || [[word:razakojo|razakojo]] || [[word:razakosho|razakosho]] || [[word:razako|razako]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:razakofoth|razakofoth]] || [[word:razakofoj|razakofoj]] || [[word:razakofosh|razakofosh]] || [[word:razakof|razakof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:razakĂŠthĂŠ|razakĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:razakĂŠjĂŠ|razakĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:razakĂŠshĂŠ|razakĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:razakĂŠ|razakĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:razakathath|razakathath]] || [[word:razakajaj|razakajaj]] || [[word:razakashash|razakashash]] || [[word:razak|razak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:razakatha|razakatha]] || [[word:razakaja|razakaja]] || [[word:razakasha|razakasha]] || [[word:razaka|razaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:razakafath|razakafath]] || [[word:razakafaj|razakafaj]] || [[word:razakafash|razakafash]] || [[word:razakaf|razakaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:razakasha|razakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gorazakasha|gorazakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokirazakasha|gokirazakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:razaknĂŒsha|razaknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gorazaknknĂŒsha|gorazaknknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokirazaknĂŒsha|gokirazaknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:razakshĂ«sha|razakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorazaknkshĂ«sha|gorazaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirazakshĂ«sha|gokirazakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:razakrosha|razakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorazaknkrosha|gorazaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirazakrosha|gokirazakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:razakmusha|razakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gorazaknkmusha|gorazaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirazakmusha|gokirazakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:razaksherasha|razaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gorazaknksherasha|gorazaknksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokirazaksherasha|gokirazaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:razakngasha|razakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gorazaknkngasha|gorazaknkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokirazakngasha|gokirazakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:razakyasha|razakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gorazaknkyasha|gorazaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokirazakyasha|gokirazakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:razakyamasha|razakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gorazaknkyamasha|gorazaknkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokirazakyamasha|gokirazakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:razaknĂŒshĂ«sha|razaknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorazaknknĂŒshĂ«sha|gorazaknknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirazaknĂŒshĂ«sha|gokirazaknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:razaknĂŒrosha|razaknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorazaknknĂŒrosha|gorazaknknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirazaknĂŒrosha|gokirazaknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:razaknĂŒmusha|razaknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorazaknknĂŒmusha|gorazaknknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirazaknĂŒmusha|gokirazaknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:razakshĂ«nĂŒsha|razakshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorazaknkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gorazaknkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirazakshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokirazakshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:razakshĂ«rosha|razakshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorazaknkshĂ«rosha|gorazaknkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirazakshĂ«rosha|gokirazakshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:razakshĂ«musha|razakshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorazaknkshĂ«musha|gorazaknkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirazakshĂ«musha|gokirazakshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:razakronĂŒsha|razakronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorazaknkronĂŒsha|gorazaknkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirazakronĂŒsha|gokirazakronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:razakroshĂ«sha|razakroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorazaknkroshĂ«sha|gorazaknkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirazakroshĂ«sha|gokirazakroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:razakromusha|razakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorazaknkromusha|gorazaknkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirazakromusha|gokirazakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:razakmunĂŒsha|razakmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorazaknkmunĂŒsha|gorazaknkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirazakmunĂŒsha|gokirazakmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:razakmushĂ«sha|razakmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorazaknkmushĂ«sha|gorazaknkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirazakmushĂ«sha|gokirazakmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:razakmurosha|razakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorazaknkmurosha|gorazaknkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirazakmurosha|gokirazakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:razak|razak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:rĂŠzĂŠk|rĂŠzĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:horazak|horazak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:horĂŠzĂŠk|horĂŠzĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohorazak|hohorazak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohorĂŠzĂŠk|hohorĂŠzĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒrazak|nĂŒrazak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒrĂŠzĂŠk|nĂŒrĂŠzĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒrazak|nĂŒnĂŒrazak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒrĂŠzĂŠk|nĂŒnĂŒrĂŠzĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻrazak|nĂŻrazak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻrĂŠzĂŠk|nĂŻrĂŠzĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻrazak|nĂŻnĂŻrazak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻrĂŠzĂŠk|nĂŻnĂŻrĂŠzĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lurazak|lurazak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lurĂŠzĂŠk|lurĂŠzĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulurazak|lulurazak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulurĂŠzĂŠk|lulurĂŠzĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lirazak|lirazak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lirĂŠzĂŠk|lirĂŠzĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilirazak|lilirazak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilirĂŠzĂŠk|lilirĂŠzĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:korazak|korazak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:korĂŠzĂŠk|korĂŠzĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokorazak|kokorazak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokorĂŠzĂŠk|kokorĂŠzĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kerazak|kerazak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kerĂŠzĂŠk|kerĂŠzĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekerazak|kekerazak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekerĂŠzĂŠk|kekerĂŠzĂŠk]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
